results.owner_or_reason: Hard-checked (not in coverage-index): staging plan.json E5-S1 '[staging] Apply engine — wiki-api CAS writes, receipts, pause state, rollback, step-APIs' (covers FR-STG13, NFR-STG3 -> ENG-2190) and E5-S3 'Scheduled ChangeSet publishing' (covers FR-STG28 -> ENG-2192) jointly implement AD-5's central-Temporal/idempotent-step-API rule; confirmed in feature-map.txt line 492 'Apply engine ... step-APIs'

Hard-checked (not in coverage-index): staging plan.json E2-S4 '[staging] Pointer-state payloads — S3 tenant-keyed bodies, sha256 hash in queue rows' (covers FR-STG6 -> ENG-2182) is a verbatim title match for AD-10; confirmed in feature-map.txt line 481

Hard-checked (not in coverage-index): staging plan.json E5-S2 '[staging] Beautification at triage — re-author, mechanical done-bar, sha256 artifact' (covers FR-STG14 -> ENG-2191) is a verbatim title match for AD-13; confirmed in feature-map.txt line 493

Hard-checked (not in coverage-index): staging plan.json E6-S1..E6-S4 (Feedback capture -> ENG-2193, Learning application & transparency -> ENG-2194, Cold-start defaults -> ENG-2195, Prompt-pack marketplace v1-minimal admin-approval install -> ENG-2196) jointly cover FR-STG15-17/27/29, matching AD-14's captured/versioned/admin-gated learning rule; confirmed in feature-map.txt lines 495-499 'Librarian learning loop, cold-start & prompt-pack marketplace'
